source: digital-transformation.atlassian.net /jira/for-you — Switch sites or apps panel (NAV4)

popover.boxShadow: rendered by portal wrapper, not dialog itself

searchInput: absent — no search row in popover
perItemBrandColor: ABSENT — Atlassian app switcher is monochrome, validates council Contrarian's flag
activeStateMechanism: ADS-internal styled selector (no aria-current, no manual accent bar)

councilImplications.perHubColor: SKIP — fails jira-parity gate (validated by live probe)
councilImplications.searchRow: SKIP — Atlassian doesn't include one at 11 items either
councilImplications.iconSize: Atlassian uses 32x32 brand icons; Catalyst hub glyphs are functional, 24x24 Atlaskit default is appropriate
councilImplications.linkItemSemantics: anchors with href — confirms LinkItem+RouterLink decision
councilImplications.descriptionColumn: ABSENT in Atlassian app switcher — supports council drop decision

notes: Atlassian app switcher in NAV4 confirms council recommendations: single-section, no search, no per-app color, ADS fill alone for active, anchors not buttons, 14px/400 label, 48px row, 8px padding, no tile chrome on icon. Catalyst HubSwitcher should mirror this structure with @atlaskit/menu LinkItem + component=RouterLink.
